_comment: ILLUSTRATIVE TEMPLATE ONLY — not maintained compliance content.

required_artifacts.description: Written sign-off from the subject-matter-expert agent confirming PHI scope and minimum-necessary access.
Auditor pre-execution review report — plan reviewed, risks documented.
Auditor post-execution review report — changes verified, compliance confirmed.
Output log from the phi_scan gate showing no unencrypted PHI in committed files.
Audit trail entries for all PHI writes: timestamp, actor, record IDs affected, reason.
